chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-342 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.1005/2022 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A No.1006/2022 4. For hearing of main case 15.04.2022 Mr. Wazir Hussain Chandio, Advocate for petitioner. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. The petitioner by way of instant petition under the garb of harassment at the hands of private respondents has sought for restraint against the official respondents from registering the FIR against him without permission of this Court. The registration of criminal case is legal function, same could not be prevented by this Court under the garb of harassment; consequently the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed application. JUDGE Muhammad Danish*
